{{Quote|I have fought the worst of all wars, and witnessed the redemption of evil. I've seen balance restored to the Force. But order can turn to chaos… as it did when I was born. Now, with my loved ones and my loyal allies, I face a new challenge unlike any before. And I'm not sure if this time we can win.|Mark Hamill as Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Commercial">{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/novel/1.html|text=''Vector Prime'' Television Commercial}}</ref>}}
The '''Vector Prime television commercial''' was released in late [[1999]] to promote the release of the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', the first entry in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|The New Jedi Order]] series. It featured a narration by [[Mark Hamill]] as [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], speaking over a montage of scenes from the [[Original trilogy]] as ''[[The Emperor's Theme]]'' played.<ref name="SW.com" />

The commercial aired on the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Syfy Sci-Fi Channel] and [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/FX_(TV_channel) FX] beginning on Monday, October 18th, 1999, and it ran several dozens of times over the ensuing weeks to promote the novel, include several spots during prime-time television hours. On FX, the commercial played during syndicated runs of [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_X-Files ''The'' ''X-Files''] and ''[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Millennium_(TV_series) Millennium]''.<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.jedinet.com/literature/archives/arc-oct99.asp|text=Mark Your Calendars|author=Ghentz|date=1999-10-14|work=[https://jedinet.com jedinet.com]|archivedate=20020613020713}}</ref> An online copy of the commercial was eventually added to the [[StarWars.com]] page for viewing and download.<ref name="SW.com" />

In 2022, Mark Hamill was asked if he remembered doing the voice-over for the commercial on Twitter, along with a link to a [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WVCV552EPGk remastered version] of the commercial. Hamill liked the tweet with the video, responding, "Wow. I have no memory of doing this at all. It's like seeing it for the first time."<ref name="Twitter">{{Twitter|MarkHamill|status/1564138806474706944|[[Mark Hamill]]|url=status/1564138806474706944|date=2022-08-29|quote=Wow. I have no memory of doing this at all. It's like seeing it for the first time. Thanks for posting, Ackbarfan. 🙏👍|archivedate=20220829063318}}</ref>
